race.comment: BUCKEYE (5) finds a winnable Maiden at start nine and can get cover from the sticky gate. Three weeks between runs when he held a forward position to go under narrowly as a dominant ($1.35 fav), over 1300m at Kembla Grange. Ready to win at this level. AMARILLO SKY (4) Zoustar gelding resuming after folding up quickly on debut at Kembla Grange last October. Given plenty of time to mature and the two trials suggest he's benefited with the break. Genuine top-four player. BETTER BLOOM (11) two career starts have had merit, but the map looks ugly for this. Warmed up late with a sound third over 1200m at Newcastle. Back in class and place prospects look best. DAME DIVIDEND (12) third up today from the good barrier and expected to make improvement. Covered plenty of ground in the run with a battling seventh over 1350m at Wyong. Stays in the mix at the good odds.
